title: dolia incana
intro: Dolia incana, also known as incane or incanum, is a type of herb that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dolia incana include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Dolia incana is often used in the form of tea, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
